name: Artichoke Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Jars marinated artichokes, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions and garlic in artichoke oil.
2. Drain the mixture.
3. Mix all ingredients together.
4. Spread the mixture in a greased 8x8-inch pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
6. The recipe can be baked, frozen, and reheated.
7. This was a great success at a Christmas Eve party. Enjoy!
